zh.lifeSummary: 當Maud de Percy於大約1335年出生在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德阿恩維克 卡素時，她的父親Henry Percy37歲，母親Idonea de Clifford36歲。她於1357年7月與John Neville在英國諾圖波藍德阿恩維克 卡素結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1379年2月18日在英國達勒姆拉比 卡素享年45歲，埋葬在英國達勒姆達勒姆達勒姆 凱德拉爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Maud de Percy于大约1335年出生在英国英格兰諾圖波藍德阿恩維克 卡素时，她的父亲Henry Percy37岁，母亲Idonea de Clifford36岁。她于1357年7月与John Neville在英国諾圖波藍德阿恩維克 卡素结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1379年2月18日在英国達勒姆拉比 卡素享年45岁，埋葬在英国達勒姆達勒姆達勒姆 凱德拉爾。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Percy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: nickname from Old French percehaie ‘pierce hedge’ (Old French percer ‘to pierce, penetrate’ + haie ‘hedge, fence’), perhaps with the sense of someone breaking into an enclosure. Percehaie is the name of one of the sons of the foxes Renart and Hermeline in the medieval French epic Roman de Renart, whose earliest known version is from the 1170s. The surname is older than that, but it may originate in a nickname for the fox as ‘enclosure piercer’, perhaps amounting to ‘chicken thief’.

habitational name from any of several places called Percy in Calvados, Eure, and Manche; William de Perci, the Domesday tenant-in-chief and under-tenant of Hugh, Earl of Chester, came from either Percy-en-Auge (Eure) or Percy (Manche).

variants.name: Piercey
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Percy  .

variants.name: Piercy
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Percy  .

nameMeanings.name: Maud
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval vernacular form of Matilda . This form was characteristically Low German (i.e. including medieval Dutch and Flemish). The wife of William the Conqueror , who bore this name, was the daughter of Baldwin , Count of Flanders. In Flemish and Dutch the letter -t- was generally lost when it occurred between vowels, giving forms such as Ma(h)auld. Maud or Matilda was also the name of the daughter ( 1102–67 ) of Henry I of England; she was married early in life to the Holy Roman Emperor Henry V , and later disputed the throne of England with her cousin Stephen . In 1128 she married Geoffrey , Count of Anjou. A medieval chronicler commented, ‘she was a good woman, but she had little bliss with him’. The name Maud became quite common in England in the 19th century, when its popularity was influenced in part by Tennyson's poem Maud, published in 1855 , but has not been much used since the early decades of the 20th century.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Maud de Percy was born about 1335, in Alnwick Castle, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom, her father, Henry Percy, was 37 and her mother, Idonea de Clifford, was 36. She married John Neville in July 1357, in Alnwick Castle, Northumberland, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 5 daughters. She died on 18 February 1379, in Raby Castle, Durham, England, at the age of 45, and was buried in Durham Cathedral, Durham, Durham, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Maud de Percy est née environ 1335, à Alnwick Castle, Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Henry Percy, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Idonea de Clifford, avait 36 ans. Elle a épousé John Neville en juillet 1357, à Alnwick Castle, Northumberland, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée le 18 février 1379, à Raby Castle, Durham, Angleterre, à l’âge de 45 ans, et a été enterrée à Durham Cathedral, Durham, Durham, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Maud de Percy um 1335 in Alnwick Castle, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Henry Percy 37 und ihre Mutter Idonea de Clifford 36. Sie hat im Juli 1357 in Alnwick Castle, Northumberland, England John Neville geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb am 18. Februar 1379 im Alter von 45 Jahren in Raby Castle, Durham, England und wurde in Durham Cathedral, Durham, Durham, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Maud de Percy è nata il circa 1335 nel Alnwick Castle, Northumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Henry Percy, aveva 37 anni e sua madre, Idonea de Clifford, aveva 36 anni. Lei sposato John Neville nel luglio 1357, nel Alnwick Castle, Northumberland, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 18 febbraio 1379, nel Raby Castle, Durham, England, all'età di 45 anni, e fu sepolta a Durham Cathedral, Durham, Durham, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Maud de Percyが約1335年にイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドアルンウィック カストルで生まれた時，父Henry Percyは37歳，母Idonea de Cliffordは36歳であった。1357年7月にイギリスノースウンバーランドアルンウィック カストルでJohn Nevilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1379年2月18日にイギリスダルハムラビー カストルで45歳で死去し，イギリスダルハムダルハムダルハム カスエドラルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Maud de Percy(이)가 대략 1335년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 알윅 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Henry Percy(은)는 37세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Idonea de Clifford(은)는 36세였다. 그녀는 1357년 7월 영국 노르스벌랜드 알윅 카스틀에서 John Neville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1379년 2월 18일 영국 뒤람 라비 카스틀에서 45세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 뒤람 뒤람 뒤람 캐테드럴에 묻혔다.

mn.Raby With Kevelstone, County Durham, Eng: Raby, Durham, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Maud de Percy nasceu aproximadamente 1335, em Alnwick Castle, Northumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Henry Percy, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Idonea de Clifford, tinha 36 anos. Ela casou-se com John Neville em julho de 1357, em Alnwick Castle, Northumberland, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 18 de fevereiro de 1379, em Raby Castle, Durham, Inglaterra, com 45 anos, e foi sepultada em Durham Cathedral, Durham, Durham, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Maud de Percy родилась около 1335 г. в местности алнвикк кастл, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Henry Percy было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Idonea de Clifford, 36. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Neville июль 1357 г. в местности алнвикк кастл, нортумбирланд, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 5 дочерей. Она умерла 18 февраля 1379 г. в местности раби кастл, дурам, Англия в возрасте 45 лет и была похоронена в местности дурам кэтедраль, дурам, дурам, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Maud de Percy nació aproximadamente 1335, en Alnwick Castle, Northumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Henry Percy, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Idonea de Clifford, tenía 36 años. Se casó con John Neville en julio de 1357, en Alnwick Castle, Northumberland, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 18 de febrero de 1379, en Raby Castle, Durham, Inglaterra, a la edad de 45 años, y fue sepultada en Durham Cathedral, Durham, Durham, Inglaterra.
